series_metadata.series_description: Manually generated form that contains eligibility criteria for Extended Unemployment Compensation(EUC)and regular Unemployment Compensation. Staff enter claimant''s personal information(e.g., name and address), the weekly benefit amount and affected "balance" of each program, program phase-out date and last week claimant may draw from the balance. the claimant is instructed to select a choice(i.e., to receive EUC or regular UI(Unemployment Insurance benefits) and respond within five business days by phone, mail, or fax dedicated folder. The hard copy form is then recycled.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until imaged ; Electronic: Retain in office 5 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
